path.description: File path, or base directory for glob/grep/mkdir (supports ~)

start.description: First line to read, 1-based (read only, default 1)

end.description: Last line to read, inclusive (read only, default end of file)

content.description: Full file content (required for write, overwrites)

edits.description: Replacements applied in order (required for edit)

old.description: Exact text to replace, must be unique in file unless all is true

pattern.description: Glob pattern e.g. **/*.py (glob) or regex (grep). Required for glob, grep

include.description: Glob filter for which files to grep when path is a directory (default all text files)
